scores.notes: The response describes what was created but does not include the actual code text, so completeness is capped at 1 per scoring instructions. The approach uses the legacy install+config-changed pattern with a _reconcile() method rather than the modern CollectStatusEvent pattern — both are valid per the gold standard notes, but the older approach is less idiomatic. All described APIs (WaitingStatus, ActiveStatus, self.config.get, install/config-changed events) are real. The charmcraft.yaml description includes a container and oci-image resource as required for K8s charms.
